user.title: cTrader App Credentials
user.description: Register your app at https://openapi.ctrader.com first. Make sure the Redirect URI below is added to your cTrader app settings.

data.redirect_uri: Redirect URI (add this to your cTrader app)

auth_code.title: Authorize & Enter Code
auth_code.description:
1. Open this link in your browser to authorize:

{auth_uri}

2. Log in with your cTID and click **Allow access**.
3. You'll be redirected — copy the `code=` value from the URL and paste it below.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your credentials and try again.
error.token_exchange_failed: Could not exchange the code for tokens. Make sure the code hasn't expired (~1 minute) and the redirect URI matches exactly.

abort.already_configured: This cTrader account is already configured.
